articles.author: Bryan Mena
articles.title: Retail sales rose more than expected in February - CNN
articles.description: Americans stepped up their spending at US retailers in February, after three consecutive months of declines, showing the US consumer hasn’t tapped out yet in the face of weak job growth and low consumer sentiment.
